lesson.menu_title: Welcoming a Visitor -- Receiving a Guest
lesson.menu_desc: Would you like...? & host phrases -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 14 -- Welcoming a Visitor -- Receiving a Guest
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Karina Macedo | Aula 14 -- Welcoming a Visitor: Receiving a Guest

listenings.text: Good morning. Welcome to our office. My name is Karina Macedo, and I am the host today. Robert, our guest, will arrive at ten. When he arrives at the reception, please call me. I want to welcome him, offer him a seat, and bring him a coffee or a glass of water. After that, I will introduce him to my colleague. Please keep the meeting room ready. Thank you very much.

Hello, this is Robert. I am almost at your office. I am very happy to visit you today. I am the guest for the ten o'clock meeting with Karina. When I arrive at the reception, I will ask for her. I would like a glass of water, please, because it is a warm day. I am ready to meet your colleague too. See you soon at the reception.

extra_audio.text: First, Robert arrived at the reception and Karina welcomed him. Then she offered him a seat and asked him to sit down. Next, she asked if he would like a coffee or a glass of water. After that, she introduced Robert to her colleague. Finally, they walked together to the meeting room.
